examples: November 26, 2003 - Last flight of the Concorde.
Practical politicians poured money into British Steel and the Concorde project.
Pepsi paid Air France an undisclosed sum in 1996 to repaint a Concorde in its corporate colors.
Airbus told CNN it had not received any requests from the Concorde group about providing support.
The Concorde partners learned this lesson 27 years, and lots of taxpayer money, too late.
